---
title: duplicated-imports
description: "Detect packages imported more than once."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect packages imported more than once. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
import (
	"strings"
	text "strings"
)
```

## Good

```go
import "strings"
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only duplicated-imports`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `note`.
